themes.reasoning_notes: Requires sacrificing a creature as an added cost and converts that body into direct damage to any target.
Often used after blocks or with a large attacker to turn combat stats into burst removal or reach.
Additional-cost creature sacrifice makes this a clear sac payoff, turning expendable or oversized creatures into reach or removal.
It deals direct damage to any target, but the card is usually enabled by creature-sacrifice or power-scaling shells rather than generic burn decks.
